name: loop-it
description: Portable Agent Skill for setting bounded coding loops in Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, and SKILL.md-compatible agents.

scripts.check: node --check bin/loop-it.mjs && node --check skills/loop-it/scripts/create-loop.mjs && node --check tests/smoke-install.mjs && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.codex-plugin/plugin.json', 'utf8'))" && npm run smoke && npm pack --dry-run
